semantic.role: Prompt template asset providing few-shot examples for architectural role descriptions, used by AI agents during source code summarization.
responsibilities: Supply a curated set of good and bad example role descriptions to guide AI agents toward high-precision, architecturally-aware summaries.
outOfScope: Does not perform any summarization or analysis logic.
Does not read or write files.
Does not interact with external systems or AI endpoints.
invariants: The exported `sourceRoleExamples` string must remain syntactically valid when interpolated into prompts.
The examples must always illustrate the distinction between precise architectural roles and vague descriptions.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a shared, maintainable source of few-shot examples for AI agents producing architectural summaries of source files.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No relevant recent change detected for this file.

publicSurface.description: A template string containing few-shot example descriptions of architectural roles, used by prompt builders to guide AI agents in generating concise, context-rich role summaries.

English.role: Prompt template asset that provides few-shot examples for writing precise architectural role descriptions, consumed by AI agents during source code summarization.
responsibilities: Provide a curated collection of good and bad example role descriptions to help AI agents produce high-quality, architecturally-aware summaries.
outOfScope: Does not contain summarization logic or analysis routines.
Does not handle file I/O or interact with APIs or databases.
